---
title: "The Rev. Lewis Macnaughton Humbert"
---

## The Rev. Lewis Macnaughton Humbert

**Dates:** (1819–1896)

### Description

Master of St. Cross Hospital

### Biography

He was successively Master of St. Cross Hospital (1855-68) and Rector of Chiddingfold;  he was later (1878) Vicar of St. Bartholomew Hyde, Winchester.  He married (1850) Ann Parker (b. 1823/4) and had children Ellen (b. 1850/1), Francis, Lewis (b. 1856/7)  and Margaret (b. 1858/9), who married the Rev. Alfred R. Wiseman. He was brother of the architect Albert Jenkins Humbert (1821–1877). [ODNB his brother; census; <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 28 th 1879
- Letter from July 31st 1875
- Letter from Aug 11th [1871]
- Letter from Oct 5th [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
